canonical_text: This canonical dataset is the baseline for admissions consistency checks across UPOU websites.
normalized_text: this canonical dataset is the baseline for admissions consistency checks across upou websites.
aliases: this canonical dataset is the baseline for admissions consistency checks across upou websites.

canonical_text: Items with uncertainty are explicitly tagged as tentative or requiring external verification.
normalized_text: items with uncertainty are explicitly tagged as tentative or requiring external verification.
aliases: items with uncertainty are explicitly tagged as tentative or requiring external verification.

canonical_text: All applicants must submit hard copies of admission documents by mail after online application.
normalized_text: all applicants must submit hard copies of admission documents by mail after online application.
aliases: all applicants must submit hard copies of admission documents by mail after online application.

canonical_text: Core eligibility and admissions-wide policy constraints.
normalized_text: core eligibility and admissions-wide policy constraints.
aliases: core eligibility and admissions-wide policy constraints.

canonical_text: Eligibility includes Philippine-based applicants, offshore-based applicants, foreign nationals, and undergraduate transfer students.
normalized_text: eligibility includes philippine-based applicants offshore-based applicants foreign nationals and undergraduate transfer students.
aliases: eligibility includes philippine-based applicants offshore-based applicants foreign nationals and undergraduate transfer students.

canonical_text: Concurrent enrollment in two or more degree programs is not allowed.
normalized_text: concurrent enrollment in two or more degree programs is not allowed.
aliases: concurrent enrollment in two or more degree programs is not allowed.

canonical_text: Applicants must not be currently enrolled (or on LOA/AWOL) in another institution and must be cleared by previously attended institutions.
normalized_text: applicants must not be currently enrolled or on loa/awol in another institution and must be cleared by previously attended institutions.
aliases: applicants must not be currently enrolled or on loa/awol in another institution and must be cleared by previously attended institutions.

canonical_text: Hard copies of all admission documents are strictly required via mail.
normalized_text: hard copies of all admission documents are strictly required via mail.
aliases: hard copies of all admission documents are strictly required via mail.

canonical_text: UPOU cannot assist foreign applicants with Student Visa (9F) processing because residence in the Philippines is not required.
normalized_text: upou cannot assist foreign applicants with student visa 9f processing because residence in the philippines is not required.
aliases: upou cannot assist foreign applicants with student visa 9f processing because residence in the philippines is not required.

canonical_text: Program intake cadence and term system guidance.
normalized_text: program intake cadence and term system guidance.
aliases: program intake cadence and term system guidance.

canonical_text: UPOU operates both semestral and trimesteral systems.
normalized_text: upou operates both semestral and trimesteral systems.
aliases: upou operates both semestral and trimesteral systems.

canonical_text: Trimester programs include all undergraduate programs, MDE, and GCDE.
normalized_text: trimester programs include all undergraduate programs mde and gcde.
aliases: trimester programs include all undergraduate programs mde and gcde.

canonical_text: Semester programs include most Graduate Certificate, Diploma, Master's, and Doctorate programs.
normalized_text: semester programs include most graduate certificate diploma master s and doctorate programs.
aliases: semester programs include most graduate certificate diploma master s and doctorate programs.

canonical_text: Restricted to 1st trimester/semester only: AADDA, ASIT, AADE, BAMS, DCS, GCAS/MAS, MIS, MDC, DIH/MIH, MAN, DCOMM, D/MRDM, DLUP.

canonical_text: UgAT is required for high school graduates and ALS A&E passers applying to Associate programs; qualified transferees are exempt.

canonical_text: UPCAT is required for new incoming freshmen applying to Bachelor's programs; AA graduates, second-degree applicants, and qualified transferees are exempt.

canonical_text: Applicants must apply via OAS then mail hard copies to the Office of the University Registrar.
normalized_text: applicants must apply via oas then mail hard copies to the office of the university registrar.

canonical_text: Signed hard copy of generated application form.
normalized_text: signed hard copy of generated application form.
aliases: signed hard copy of generated application form.

canonical_text: Original Official Transcript of Records with valid remarks.
normalized_text: original official transcript of records with valid remarks.
aliases: original official transcript of records with valid remarks.

canonical_text: Original PSA-issued birth certificate.
normalized_text: original psa-issued birth certificate.

canonical_text: One 2x2 colored ID photo with white/off-white background, taken within four months, with handwritten name tag and signature.
normalized_text: one 2x2 colored id photo with white/off-white background taken within four months with handwritten name tag and signature.
aliases: one 2x2 colored id photo with white/off-white background taken within four months with handwritten name tag and signature.

canonical_text: AADDA, ASIT, and AADE applicants must submit a 500-word essay on motivation and future plans.
normalized_text: aadda asit and aade applicants must submit a 500-word essay on motivation and future plans.
aliases: aadda asit and aade applicants must submit a 500-word essay on motivation and future plans.

canonical_text: Graduate/Post-Graduate applicants must submit two letters of recommendation.
normalized_text: graduate/post-graduate applicants must submit two letters of recommendation.
aliases: graduate/post-graduate applicants must submit two letters of recommendation.

canonical_text: Undergraduate applicants must complete DERM before admission.
normalized_text: undergraduate applicants must complete derm before admission.
aliases: undergraduate applicants must complete derm before admission.

canonical_text: Unit and GWA thresholds for transfer applicants.
normalized_text: unit and gwa thresholds for transfer applicants.
aliases: unit and gwa thresholds for transfer applicants.

canonical_text: From a UP unit: at least 30 units with GWA 2.5 or better.
normalized_text: from a up unit: at least 30 units with gwa 2.5 or better.

canonical_text: From a non-UP unit: at least 33 units with GWA 2.0 or better.
normalized_text: from a non-up unit: at least 33 units with gwa 2.0 or better.

canonical_text: PE, NSTP, theology, and technical courses are excluded from unit and GWA computations.
normalized_text: pe nstp theology and technical courses are excluded from unit and gwa computations.
aliases: pe nstp theology and technical courses are excluded from unit and gwa computations.

canonical_text: Fees, payment channels, and available financial support.
normalized_text: fees payment channels and available financial support.
aliases: fees payment channels and available financial support.

canonical_text: Application fee (non-refundable): Filipino citizens PhP 350.00 (Undergrad), PhP 500.00 (Diploma/Masters/Doctorate).
normalized_text: application fee non-refundable : filipino citizens php 350.00 undergrad php 500.00 diploma/masters/doctorate .

canonical_text: Application fee (non-refundable): Foreign nationals USD 75.00 (Undergrad), USD 100.00 (Diploma/Masters/Doctorate).
normalized_text: application fee non-refundable : foreign nationals usd 75.00 undergrad usd 100.00 diploma/masters/doctorate .

canonical_text: Tuition: PhP 1,000.00 per unit across all levels.
normalized_text: tuition: php 1 000.00 per unit across all levels.

canonical_text: Miscellaneous fees: PhP 2,000.00 per term (Energy 250, Library 1,100, Registration 40, Technology 610).
normalized_text: miscellaneous fees: php 2 000.00 per term energy 250 library 1 100 registration 40 technology 610 .

canonical_text: New student fees: ID fee PhP 130, deposit PhP 100, entrance fee PhP 30.
normalized_text: new student fees: id fee php 130 deposit php 100 entrance fee php 30.

canonical_text: Payment channels: UPOU online payment gateway (cards), Landbank Link.BizPortal (Landbank/Bancnet/GCash), or cash payment at UPOU Cash Office.
normalized_text: payment channels: upou online payment gateway cards landbank link.bizportal landbank/bancnet/gcash or cash payment at upou cash office.

canonical_text: Financial aid options: SAGA, SLP, and REACH.
normalized_text: financial aid options: saga slp and reach.

canonical_text: Enrollment load policy requiring ORS approval outside standard limits.
normalized_text: enrollment load policy requiring ors approval outside standard limits.
aliases: enrollment load policy requiring ors approval outside standard limits.

canonical_text: Underloading: Undergraduate students below 12 units (excluding PE and CWTS) must apply in ORS.
normalized_text: underloading: undergraduate students below 12 units excluding pe and cwts must apply in ors.

canonical_text: Overloading: Undergraduate students above 12 units or graduate students above 6 units must apply in ORS.
normalized_text: overloading: undergraduate students above 12 units or graduate students above 6 units must apply in ors.
